seo.title: Embedded & AUTOSAR Expertise | BSW TECH

hero.title: Our Engineering Expertise
hero.subtitle: Deep technical knowledge across embedded systems, automotive, IoT, and full-stack development.

areas.title: Embedded Systems (C/C++)
areas.description: We build low-level software for microcontrollers and electronic control units (ECUs).
expertise: Firmware in C/C++ for ARM Cortex, STM32, and other MCUs

areas.title: Automotive Engineering
areas.description: We deliver safe and reliable automotive software solutions.

areas.title: IoT Solutions

expertise: Cloud dashboards (AWS IoT, Azure IoT, Google Cloud)

areas.title: Product Design & Prototyping
areas.description: From idea to industrialization — we design and prototype complete electronic products.

areas.title: Mobile & Full-Stack Development
areas.description: We create connected mobile apps and backend systems that bridge devices with users.

areas.title: Digital Twin Philosophy
areas.description: We build it virtually before we build it physically — reducing risk, cost, and time-to-market.
expertise: Real-time digital replicas of physical systems

areas.title: Public Services & GovTech
